messages: Hi, I'm Dia. It's nice to meet you~
Long time no see. Time really flies...
Hey there~ Come hang out with me!
Learning is fun, and fun makes us want to learn even more~
console: Haha, you opened the console. Trying to uncover my little secrets?
copy: What did you copy? Don't forget to credit the source if you share it!

welcome.5_7: Good morning! A beautiful day is just getting started.
welcome.7_11: Good morning! Hope work is going smoothly. Don't sit for too long!
welcome.11_13: It's noon already. You've been busy all morning, so it's time for lunch!
welcome.13_17: Afternoons can get sleepy. Maybe stretch a little or grab a coffee?
welcome.17_19: It's evening now. The sunset outside must be beautiful.
welcome.19_21: Good evening. How did your day go?
21_23: It's getting late. Try to rest early tonight~
Take good care of your eyes at night!
welcome.24: Still awake? You're quite the night owl. Will you be able to get up tomorrow?

text: Waaah... what are you doing? O.O
Please be gentle, I'm a very delicate little robot! O.O
I'm here! What can I help you with? O.O
Click here to go back to the home page.
Want to head home?
The home page is right here.
Here are my master's latest updates.
Want to know more about my master?
This page hides a few little secrets about my master.
You found my master's secret hideout!
This is where all of my master's work is stored.
Want to browse my master's library?
All of my master's older stories are here.
Click here to browse the article tags.
Tags help keep articles neatly organized.
You can leave a message for my master here.
Here are some of my master's friends.
This page is full of photos from everyday life.

text: Here's a short introduction to my master.

events.text: It's Valentine's Day. Have you met someone special in {year} yet?
A little secret for you: it's April Fool's Day, so don't believe everything you hear~
Today is Labour Day. Any plans for the holiday?
It's almost Christmas. My master is probably shopping again~
It's New Year's Eve. This year is ending, but the next one will be even better!
